_comment: Copy to projects.json to run several projects from one bot process.
Each entry binds a Discord guild (server) ID to its own prompt, repo, Drive
folder, and tool packs. Guilds not listed here get NO response — the bot never
falls back to another project's configuration.
Delete this file (or don't create projects.json) to stay in single-project
mode, where everything comes from environment variables.
Anything you omit falls back to the matching environment variable, so shared
settings like githubToken and gitAuthorEmail can stay in .env.
To get a guild ID: enable Developer Mode in Discord, right-click the server
